title: Pulse Select
label: ug_pulse-select
chain: Clock(value=1, mode=Samples)=> metro | Clock(value=20, mode=Samples) -> Select(values=[1, 2, 4], mode=Cycle) => step | metro -> PulseSelect(duration_values=[2, 4, 8], duration_mode=Cycle) => m1 | step ->:step m1 | metro -> PulseSelect(duration_values=[2, 4, 8, 16], duration_mode=Shuffle) => m2 | step ->:step m2
